name: Zero-content source package
narrative_summary: Source package contains 20 volumes spanning 676 chapters, all represented as llm_unavailable fallback stubs with confidence 0.0. No narrative content, story mechanics, craft patterns, or design hooks exist in extractable form. Upstream LLM pipeline failure prevents any downstream distillation synthesis.

name: Prose craft analysis blocked
narrative_summary: No sentence rhythm, paragraph structure, dialogue conventions, description strategy, exposition mechanics, emotional temperature, or hooking transitions extractable from source material. Author craft card generation impossible with current data fidelity.

name: Story mechanics extraction failure
narrative_summary: All 20 volume cards report empty reusable_mechanisms arrays, empty state_progression arrays, and empty turning_points arrays. No reader reward signals, no open hooks, no identifiable story-design mechanics present across entire chapter batch.

name: Volume aggregation prevented
narrative_summary: Book_design_card synthesis blocked by upstream chapter-to-volume distillation failure across all 20 volumes. No arc_function classification possible, no dominant_engine identifiable, no setup_payoff_rhythm measurable. Current source package cannot support design fingerprint generation without reprocessing through functional LLM pipeline.
